isPage.title: Industrial Solutions
isPage.description: Comprehensive thermal imaging solutions for diverse industrial applications including thermography, security monitoring, gas detection, firefighting, UAVs, and personal vision.
isPage.exploreDesc: Choose from our comprehensive range of thermal imaging solutions designed for specific industry needs.
isPage.scenariosDesc: Discover how our thermal imaging technology is applied across various industries and use cases.
isPage.ctaDesc: Our team of experts can help you find the perfect thermal imaging solution for your specific application requirements.
isPage.sol_thermo_desc: Advanced thermal imaging for power maintenance, machine vision, building HVAC, and predictive maintenance.
isPage.sol_security_desc: Safe city surveillance, infrastructure monitoring, border security, and maritime cruising solutions.
isPage.sol_gas_desc: Visualize invisible VOCs and detect gas leakages with high-sensitivity thermal imaging.
isPage.sol_fire_desc: Forest fire prevention, fire detection, and search & rescue operations with thermal imaging.
isPage.sol_uavs_desc: Thermal imaging solutions for equipment inspection, enforcement, firefighting, and animal observation.
isPage.sol_personal_desc: Outdoor leisure, animal observation, and enforcement patrol with portable thermal devices.
isPage.cat_thermo_s1_desc: Thermal imaging technique is an advanced technology for diagnosing the hot spots in substations, transmission lines and distribution networks. It helps quickly locate hot spots, determine the severity of problems, and establish repair timeframes.
isPage.cat_thermo_s1_f1: Support LAN interface with Gigabit Ethernet
isPage.cat_thermo_s2_desc: Infrared thermal imaging enables machines to "see" the invisible and carry out non-contact temperature measurement accurately, fearless of smoke, dust, glare, or back-lighting.
isPage.cat_thermo_s3_desc: Infrared thermal imaging technology identifies building safety issues from surface temperature distribution, detecting defective insulation, electrical failures, water seepage, and more.
isPage.cat_security_s1_desc: Thermal imaging surveillance systems provide fast, economical solutions to increase security and protect citizens in areas lacking sufficient illumination, enabling continuous day and night monitoring.
isPage.cat_security_s2_desc: Thermal imaging systems cover long ranges up to 20 kilometers for power plants, industrial areas, dams, and airports, serving as early warning detection and intrusion monitoring systems.
isPage.cat_security_s3_desc: Thermal imaging systems with long detection range operate in extreme weather conditions day and night, making them ideal for border zone reconnaissance and detection.
isPage.cat_fire_s1_desc: Forest fire prevention systems with IR integrated carry out real-time, long-distance monitoring in all weather conditions, finding accumulated heat, hidden fire sources, or early fires.
isPage.cat_fire_s1_f1: Large array for wide FOV searching
isPage.cat_fire_s2_desc: Infrared thermal imaging detects abnormal temperature rises before visible fire occurs, providing early warning without interference by smoke, strong light, or darkness.
isPage.cat_fire_s3_desc: Thermal imagers help firefighters see through smoke, clearly showing the real situation of fire scenes for quick and effective decision-making in rescue operations.
isPage.cat_uavs_s1_desc: UAVs with infrared thermal imaging quickly detect abnormal temperature areas in petrochemical pipelines, power lines, and photovoltaic systems, improving inspection efficiency.
isPage.cat_uavs_s2_desc: IR UAVs work throughout day and night, penetrating heavy smoke and haze with visual distance of several hundred meters, quickly identifying humans in complex environments.
isPage.cat_uavs_s3_desc: Infrared thermal imaging enables UAVs to detect animals with significant temperature differences from the environment, improving survey accuracy while reducing interference.

thermographyPage.title: Thermography
thermographyPage.description: Advanced thermal imaging solutions for power maintenance, machine vision, building inspection, industrial monitoring, and medical diagnosis applications.
thermographyPage.ctaDesc: Discover our complete range of industrial thermal imaging solutions.
thermographyPage.app1_desc: Thermal imaging technique is an advanced technology for diagnosing hot spots in substations, transmission lines and distribution networks. It plays a key role in finding, preventing and handling accidents in the power industry. Infrared technology gives us the ability to "see" and measure temperatures on defective components and detect normal wear, chemical contamination, corrosion, fatigue and faulty assembly in electrical systems.
thermographyPage.app1_solution: On-line Monitoring Systems, Robots, Portable Thermal Imagers, UAV Payloads
thermographyPage.app1_f1: Support LAN interface: Gigabit Ethernet adaptive, hundred meters transmission
thermographyPage.app1_f2: High precision temperature measurement, adjustable temperature range
thermographyPage.app1_f3: Professional thermography analysis: regional analysis, multi-spots temperature measurement
thermographyPage.app1_f4: Isotherm, high temperature alarm, hot spot automatic tracking
thermographyPage.app2_desc: Machine vision carries out measurement and makes judgment instead of human eyes. Infrared thermal imaging enables machines to "see" the invisible and carry out non-contact temperature measurement accurately, fearless of smoke, dust, glare, back-lighting etc. It can be applied in process instruction, packing, sorting, moisture detection, contamination monitoring, and abnormal temperature measurement.
thermographyPage.app2_solution: On-line Monitoring Systems, Robots, Nondestructive Testing
thermographyPage.app2_f1: Support LAN interface: Gigabit Ethernet adaptive, flexible network
thermographyPage.app2_f2: High precision temperature measurement, adjustable temperature range
thermographyPage.app2_f3: High frame rate at window mode for nondestructive testing
thermographyPage.app3_desc: If buildings have design defects such as unqualified insulation, hollowing, or moisture, they usually cannot be detected by naked eyes. Infrared thermal imaging technology identifies building safety from surface temperature distribution. It detects defective insulation, electrical failures, water seepage, pipeline issues, and mold.
thermographyPage.app3_solution: Portable Thermal Imager, Smartphone Plug-in Thermal Imager
thermographyPage.app3_f1: Professional thermography analysis with multi-spots measurement
thermographyPage.app3_f2: Pseudo-color visual enhancement for slight temperature differences
thermographyPage.app3_f3: Walls and pipes details clearly visible
thermographyPage.app4_desc: Thermal imaging technology has broad applications in petrochemical and metallurgy industries, widely used for inspections of steel ladles, blast furnaces, converters, rotary kilns, and key channels. Inspection tools integrated with infrared thermal imaging help with difficult diagnostic challenges and day-to-day predictive maintenance operations.
thermographyPage.app4_solution: On-line Monitoring Systems, Portable Thermal Imager
thermographyPage.app4_f1: Support LAN interface: Gigabit Ethernet adaptive
thermographyPage.app4_f2: High precision temperature measurement up to 2000°C with high temperature filter
thermographyPage.app4_f3: Professional thermography analysis: regional analysis, multi-spots measurement
thermographyPage.app4_f4: Isotherm, high temperature alarm, hot spot automatic tracking
thermographyPage.app5_desc: Infrared thermal imaging technology features real-time, accurate and non-destructive measurement. It enables condition monitoring and defect diagnosis while equipment is still running. It helps quickly locate hot spots, determine problem severity, and establish repair timeframes, greatly avoiding the risk of sudden equipment failure.
thermographyPage.app5_solution: On-line Surveillance, Robots, Portable Thermal Imager
thermographyPage.app5_f1: Support LAN interface for flexible networking
thermographyPage.app6_desc: Painful diseases often show significant body temperature differences in lesion regions, such as acute/chronic shoulder and neck pain, cervical spondylopathy, lumbar spondylosis, and myofascial pain syndrome. Infrared thermal imaging technology has unique diagnostic value by presenting thermal images indicating temperature distribution.
thermographyPage.app6_f1: Pseudo-color visual enhancement for blood vessels and lesions location

securityPage.title: Security Monitoring
securityPage.description: Comprehensive thermal imaging solutions for safe city surveillance, infrastructure protection, border security, maritime applications, and mining safety.
securityPage.ctaDesc: Discover our complete range of industrial thermal imaging solutions.
securityPage.app1_desc: City areas lacking sufficient illumination have higher criminality rates and require more manpower to monitor. Thermal imaging surveillance systems are a fast, economical and ideal solution to increase security and protect citizens' lives and property through prevention and faster response in critical situations.
securityPage.app1_solution: Box Camera, Dome Camera, IR/Visual Dual-light Security Monitoring System
securityPage.app1_f1: Continuous working through day and night
securityPage.app1_f2: Support LAN interface: Gigabit Ethernet adaptive, hundred meters transmission
securityPage.app1_f3: High temperature alarm, hot spot automatic tracking
securityPage.app2_desc: Intrusion prevention and detection work in and around power plants, industrial areas, dams, airports and other large infrastructure is challenging due to their size, lighting conditions and terrain. Thermal imaging systems can cover long ranges up to 20 kilometers, serving as early warning detection and intrusion monitoring cameras.
securityPage.app2_solution: Box Camera, Dome Camera, IR/Visual Dual-light Security Monitoring System
securityPage.app2_f3: Support LAN interface for flexible networking
securityPage.app2_f4: High temperature alarm, hot spot automatic tracking
securityPage.app3_desc: Borders and coastlines often have complex terrain spanning vast areas with various and harsh weather conditions. Ordinary monitoring systems cannot withstand all weather conditions and fail to meet long-range intrusion detection requirements. Thermal imaging systems have long detection and recognition range, operating in extreme conditions day and night.
securityPage.app3_solution: Dual-light, Three-light or Multi-light Fusion Systems
securityPage.app3_f1: Large array for wide FOV searching
securityPage.app3_f2: Motorized/continuous zoom long-focus lens for extended range
securityPage.app4_desc: Infrared thermal imaging detectors and modules can be integrated into fixed or hand-held devices for commercial ships, government ships, fishing boats and cruise ships. It detects water areas at long range without fear of total darkness, rain, fog and sun glare, especially suitable for night navigation, anti-collision, anti-piracy and search & rescue.
securityPage.app4_f1: All day and night work, penetrate fog, anti-glare
securityPage.app4_f3: Shock and vibration resistant for harsh offshore environment
securityPage.app4_f5: Low power consumption for long battery life
securityPage.app5_desc: Coal mine safety is important but very difficult due to the harsh smoggy, dusty and dark environment below the mine. IR stationary monitoring systems, portable thermal imagers, and robots with IR function are applied in coal mines to inspect hidden fire sources, flooded locations, and motorized equipment.
securityPage.app5_solution: On-line Surveillance, Robots, Portable Thermal Imager
securityPage.app5_f1: Professional thermographic analysis: regional analysis, multi-spots measurement
securityPage.app5_f2: Isotherm, high temperature alarm, hot spot automatic tracking
securityPage.app5_f4: Clear imaging under strong light, backlight and dark conditions

firefightingPage.title: Firefighting & Rescue
firefightingPage.description: Advanced thermal imaging solutions for forest fire prevention, fire detection, and search & rescue operations with superior smoke penetration capabilities.
firefightingPage.ctaDesc: Discover our complete range of industrial thermal imaging solutions.
firefightingPage.app1_desc: Forest fires prevention is challenging because the forest area is vast, foggy and dimly while initial fires are often small unobvious flames, which is difficult to see by human eyes or visual camera monitoring. The forest fire prevention system with IR integrated can carry out real-time, long-distance monitoring in all weather conditions for all day long.
firefightingPage.app1_f1: Large array for wide FOV searching
firefightingPage.app1_f2: Motorized/continuous zoom long-focus lens for extended range
firefightingPage.app1_f3: High temperature alarm with automatic alerts
firefightingPage.app1_f6: Early detection of accumulated heat and hidden fire sources
firefightingPage.app2_desc: Fire generally needs to go through the process of surface temperature rising, smog and visible fire. Infrared thermal imaging has the function of non-contact heat detection and temperature measurement. Before smog and visible fire, it can sensitively detect abnormal temperature rise and timely warn to eliminate fire hazards.
firefightingPage.app2_f1: High temperature alarm, hot spot automatic tracking
firefightingPage.app2_f3: Clear imaging under strong light, backlight and dark conditions
firefightingPage.app3_desc: Smoke generated from fire often causes great difficulties to rescue efforts, like hindering firefighters from finding passageways, locating trapped persons and valuables. Infrared thermal imagers help firefighters see through smoke, clearly showing the real situation of fire scenes for quick and effective decision-making.
firefightingPage.app3_solution: Handheld Thermal Imager, Firefighting Helmet, Firefighting Glasses, UAVs
firefightingPage.app3_f2: Clear imaging under strong light, backlight and dark conditions
firefightingPage.app3_f4: Low power consumption for extended operation
firefightingPage.app3_f5: Long battery life for extended missions

uavsPage.title: UAVs Payload
uavsPage.description: Compact and lightweight thermal imaging solutions designed for drone integration, enabling equipment inspection, rescue operations, firefighting support, and wildlife observation.
uavsPage.ctaDesc: Discover our complete range of industrial thermal imaging solutions.
uavsPage.app1_desc: In routine inspection of petrochemical pipelines, power transmission and photovoltaic power generation systems, there may be problems of blind areas and low inspection efficiency in manual operation. UAVs equipped with infrared thermal imaging can quickly detect abnormal high or low temperature areas, analyzing oil leakage in pipelines or overheating risks in power lines and photovoltaic panels.
uavsPage.app1_f2: Professional thermography analysis: regional analysis, multi-spots measurement
uavsPage.app1_f3: Isotherm, high temperature alarm, hot spot automatic tracking
uavsPage.app1_f4: Low power consumption for extended flight time
uavsPage.app1_f5: Quick detection of abnormal temperature areas
uavsPage.app1_f6: Improved inspection efficiency with reduced personnel risk
uavsPage.app2_desc: UAVs equipped with infrared thermal imaging can work throughout day and night without external light sources. They can penetrate heavy smoke, haze and other adverse conditions with visual distance of several hundred meters. They can quickly identify human bodies in complex environments or camouflage conditions, ideal for disaster response and law enforcement.
uavsPage.app2_f3: Visual distance of several hundred meters
uavsPage.app2_f4: Quick human identification in complex environments
uavsPage.app2_f6: Low power consumption for long battery life
uavsPage.app3_desc: UAVs equipped with infrared thermal imaging modules can overlook fires through thick smoke, quickly locating trapped people, fire points and potential risks. They help firefighters formulate accurate fire-fighting plans and can patrol forests and grasslands to find high-temperature or flammable points.
uavsPage.app4_desc: Infrared thermal imaging modules enable UAVs to have non-contact detection of heat. As long as there is significant temperature difference between animals and the environment, hidden animals can be found. UAVs have characteristics of large depth, wide field of view and high mobility, improving survey timeliness and accuracy while reducing danger to personnel.
uavsPage.app4_f2: Detection of animals with temperature difference
uavsPage.app4_f3: Large depth and wide field of view

personalVisionPage.title: Personal Vision
personalVisionPage.description: Compact and portable thermal imaging solutions for outdoor enthusiasts, wildlife observers, and law enforcement professionals.
personalVisionPage.ctaDesc: Discover our complete range of industrial thermal imaging solutions.
personalVisionPage.app1_desc: Outdoor sports have been praised as a healthy lifestyle, including mountain climbing, camping, adventure, rock climbing, and caving. In the dark night or dense jungle, thermal imagers help travelers quickly observe surroundings to detect wild animals and ensure camp safety. They also help see road conditions clearly to avoid getting lost regardless of weather conditions.
personalVisionPage.app1_solution: Goggles, Industrial Mobile Phone, Smartphone Plug-in Thermal Imager
personalVisionPage.app1_f2: Low power consumption for long battery life
personalVisionPage.app2_desc: Infrared thermal imaging can see animal thermal images through temperature difference without any light at night, which is suitable for wildlife observation and protection in mountain forest, grassland, desert, water area and other terrain. Non-invasive observation protects wildlife while enabling detailed study.
personalVisionPage.app2_solution: Handheld, Goggles, Infrared Helmet, Infrared Glasses
personalVisionPage.app2_f2: Shutterless-like working mode for fluent imaging
personalVisionPage.app2_f5: Low power consumption for long battery time
personalVisionPage.app3_desc: In poor vision at night or in mountains and forests, thermal imaging assists in investigation, patrol, search, monitoring and tracking of personnel all day long in darkness or bad weather. The equipment absorbs infrared thermal radiation for imaging without emitting light, enabling covert reconnaissance without exposing law enforcement personnel.
personalVisionPage.app3_solution: Handheld, Goggles, Infrared Helmet, Infrared Glasses
personalVisionPage.app3_f2: Shutterless-like working mode for smooth imaging
personalVisionPage.app3_f4: Shock and vibration resistant for field use

opticalGasPage.title: Optical Gas Imaging
opticalGasPage.description: Advanced infrared thermal imaging technology for visualizing invisible gases and detecting leakages with high sensitivity and safety.
opticalGasPage.ctaDesc: Discover our complete range of industrial thermal imaging solutions.
opticalGasPage.app1_desc: Infrared thermal imaging technology uses spectral wavelength filtering to visualize invisible VOCs (volatile organic compounds) that cannot be seen by naked eyes. It is a real-time non-contact measurement method that can detect gas leakage in dangerous areas or areas that are difficult to access, ensuring the safety of inspection personnel.
opticalGasPage.app1_solution: Portable Gas Detection Equipment, On-line Monitoring System
opticalGasPage.app1_f1: 3.2-3.5μm spectral response for optimal gas detection
opticalGasPage.app1_f4: Safe and efficient operation in hazardous areas
opticalGasPage.app1_f5: Suitable for low gas concentration detection
opticalGasPage.app1_f6: Works with slow gas flow rate scenarios

aboutPage.companyDesc1: ShenZhen ChengJing Technology Co., Ltd is the world leading infrared detector manufacturer and service provider. It is willing to provide customers around the world with high-performance uncooled and cooled thermal imaging detectors, and to share its professional application experience with customers.
aboutPage.companyDesc2: ShenZhen ChengJing Technology Co., Ltd is located at Shenzhen, Guangdong, China. The company covers an area of 30 thousand square meters with 20 thousand square meters of dust-free fabrication workshops. It is equipped with full set of advanced fabrication equipment to fabricate both uncooled and cooled IR detectors. Currently, the annual production capacity of thermal imaging detectors has reached 1 million units.
aboutPage.companyDesc3: ChengJing IR detectors have been widely used in thermography, security & surveillance, personal vision, automotive and consumer infrared products. The volume production of wafer-level-packaging infrared detectors has been successfully achieved with very competitive cost for high volume consumer market.
aboutPage.statsDesc: Expert in thermal imaging technology with global reach, offering high-performance uncooled and cooled detectors along with professional application insights from our advanced facility in Shenzhen.
aboutPage.locationDesc: Located in Shenzhen, Guangdong, China, ShenZhen ChengJing Technology Co., Ltd operates in a state-of-the-art facility dedicated to infrared detector manufacturing and innovation.
aboutPage.addressText: WanLian Building, Baoan Street, Baoan District, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China

servicesPage.title: Services & Support
servicesPage.description: Professional thermal imaging solutions and expert technical support
servicesPage.coreServicesDesc: After years of industrial application experience, ChengJing Technology is capable to provide professional, efficient and convenient solutions for customers in different industries.
servicesPage.coreService1: Both uncooled and cooled IR detectors in different formats and pixel size
servicesPage.coreService2: Three production lines with annual production capability up to millions of detectors.
servicesPage.oneStopTitle: Not Only IR Detector, but ONE-STOP Solution
servicesPage.oneStopDesc: The Infrared Platform developed by ChengJing covers every component in a complete infrared camera, including IR lens, IR detectors, hardware & processing electronics, software & solutions. Each part is designed as standard module for flexible integration combination. ChengJing is open to share its application experience accumulated in the past 10 years to support our partners to design their own complete infrared products easily, economically and efficiently.
servicesPage.faq1_q: Q1: What is infrared thermal imaging?
servicesPage.faq1_a: Infrared thermal imaging is a method of using infrared radiation and thermal energy to gather information about objects, in order to formulate images of them, even in low visibility environments. It's based on the fact that all objects emit infrared radiation depending on their temperature.
servicesPage.faq2_a: Thermography is a non-invasive diagnostic method, based on object surface temperature detection. The infrared (IR) radiation emitted from an object is captured by an infrared camera and converted into thermal images or thermograms showing temperature distribution patterns.
servicesPage.faq3_q: Q3: What is the advantage of infrared thermal imaging?
servicesPage.faq4_q: Q4: What is infrared detector/thermal imaging sensor?
servicesPage.faq4_a: Infrared waves cannot be seen with the human eye. Infrared detector/thermal imaging sensor is an optical-electrical device to react to infrared radiation and convert the detected radiation into measurable electrical signals for subsequent signal processing and image display.
servicesPage.faq5_q: Q5: What is the difference between uncooled and cooled IR detectors?
servicesPage.faq5_a: There are currently two types of infrared thermal imaging sensors on the market, cooled and uncooled.Uncooled IR detectors operate at ambient temperature without additional cooling system, featuring lower cost, smaller size, lighter weight and lower power consumption. Cooled IR detectors need to be cooled to cryogenic temperatures (typically 77K) by built-in cryocoolers for higher sensitivity and faster response time.
servicesPage.faq6_q: Q6: What is thermal imaging module?
servicesPage.faq6_a: There are currently two types of infrared thermal imaging sensors on the market, cooled and uncooled. Uncooled IR detectors operate at ambient temperature without additional cooling, making them cost-effective, compact, and energy-efficient. Cooled IR detectors require cryogenic cooling for enhanced sensitivity. A thermal imaging module integrates the detector with optics and electronics into a complete imaging solution.
servicesPage.faq7_a: NETD refers to "Noise Equivalent Temperature Difference". It is a measure of how well a thermal imaging detector is able to distinguish between very small differences in thermal radiation in the image. The lower the NETD value, the better the thermal sensitivity of the detector.
servicesPage.faq8_a: SWaP3 refers to size, weight, power, performance and price. It indicates the technology trend of infrared industry.
servicesPage.faq9_a: DRI usually refers detection, recognition and identification distance of a thermal imaging system. It is a crucial parameter to judge the performance of a thermal imaging system, especially in security and surveillance applications.
servicesPage.faq10_q: Q10: What is WLP? What's the advantage of WLP?
servicesPage.faq10_a: WLP refers to wafer level package. Together with metal package, ceramic package, they are the 3 main package formats of uncooled infrared detectors. WLP offers significant advantages including smaller size, lower cost at high volumes, and better integration possibilities for consumer applications.
